attributes.description: Typed key/value map (DBC BA_ equivalent). Keys should match a declared `attributeDefinitions[].name`; values are scalars validated against that definition by tooling, not by this schema.

annotations.description: Shared metadata cluster available on every entity (node, signal, computedSignal, message, network, vehicle). Composed via `allOf` in `hierarchy.json` so the set stays uniform: typed `attributes` (DBC BA_/BA_DEF_ system).
